description: The render stage is currently a 501 stub. Implement it to composite all pipeline outputs into an annotated video, matching what the original notebook did: bounding boxes, segmentation masks, jersey numbers, team colors, court keypoints. Add Logfire instrumentation. Reference the notebook rendering cells for the exact supervision annotation pipeline.
title: Implement render stage — annotated video with detections, tracks, teams, OCR, court overlay

description: The SSE EventSource currently connects directly to FastAPI at port 8080, bypassing Next.js proxy because Next.js rewrites buffer streaming responses. Replace with a Next.js Route Handler at app/api/pipeline/events/[videoId]/route.ts that uses ReadableStream to proxy SSE without buffering. Then revert use-sse.ts to use relative URLs. See commit 5fb2293 for the current workaround.
title: Replace direct SSE port with Next.js Route Handler streaming proxy
